questions.q: In April 2026, an undercover investigation revealed that 331 children were infected with HIV due to rampant syringe reuse at a government hospital in which country?
In April 2026, which European country approved a sweeping plan to grant legal status to around 500,000 undocumented migrants to integrate them into the formal workforce?
Following his crushing April 2026 election defeat, the Kremlin played down the loss of which long-time Hungarian ally, claiming they "were never friends"?
According to its Internal Security Service's annual report released in April 2026, which Baltic nation unmasked and apprehended a record number of Russian spies and collaborators?
In April 2026, China's government labeled the United States' naval blockade of ports in which Middle Eastern country as "irresponsible and dangerous"?
